item.name: Onokoro Carp
item.description:
This otherwise average wavekin would never be caught dead in less temperate climes.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: A variety of omnivorous bream with tawny scales and an undiscriminating appetite. Its taste for both bottom-dwelling shellfish and all manner of sea wrack has earned it a reputation as the sanitizer of the seafloor.
